sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23768" key="deipnosofisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δειπνοσοφιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n23768.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one learned in the mysteries of the kitchen</tr_>: in pl., title of work by Athenaeus.</sense> </entryFree>
